description: Analyze Weather Prediction Task (WPT) probabilistic learning data located at ~/pebl/data/wpt_data.csv. Calculate the 'Optimal Response Rate' (where 'response' == 'optimal_choice') for each participant across five chronological blocks of 20 trials each. Determine each participant's 'learning_score' as the difference between the Optimal Response Rate of Block 5 and Block 1. Exclude 'sub-999' from group calculations due to perseverative responding and flag them with 'excluded': true in the final report. Calculate the group mean Optimal Response Rate for each block across all valid participants. Output the results to ~/pebl/analysis/wpt_report.json following the structure: {"participants": [{"id": "sub-XX", "block_optimal_rates": {"1": 0.55, ...}, "learning_score": 0.25}, ...], "group_learning_curve": {"1": 0.53, ...}}. Generate a line plot of the group learning curve (X: Blocks 1-5, Y: Mean Optimal Response Rate) and save it to ~/pebl/analysis/wpt_learning_curve.png.

metadata.data_source: Simulated structural WPT dataset mirroring OpenNeuro ds000231 classification learning
